zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Rachel Eccles於1510年出生在英國爾維爾姆斯洛福時，她的父親John Henry Eccles20歲，母親Elizabeth Spurr20歲。她和Sir Theodore Wilkinson至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她於1714年住在蘇格蘭阿吉爾赫夫且於1714年住在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯。她去世於1589年在英國爾維爾姆斯洛福享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Rachel Eccles于1510年出生在英国爾維爾姆斯洛福时，她的父亲John Henry Eccles20岁，母亲Elizabeth Spurr20岁。她和Sir Theodore Wilkinson至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她于1714年住在苏格兰阿吉爾赫夫且于1714年住在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯。她去世于1589年在英国爾維爾姆斯洛福享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eccles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

variants.name: Exley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Exley in Southowram (Yorkshire), from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Eccles .
Americanized form of South German   Oechsle  .

variants.name: Echols
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eckles
meanings: English: variant of   Eccles  . This form is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Rachel Eccles was born in 1510, in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, her father, John Henry Eccles, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Spurr, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Sir Theodore Wilkinson. She lived in Hough, Argyll, Scotland in 1714 and Great Budworth, Cheshire, England in 1714. She died in 1589, in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Rachel Eccles est née en 1510, à Wilmslow, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Henry Eccles, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Spurr, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Theodore Wilkinson. Elle a vécu à Hough, Argyll, Écosse en 1714 et à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1714. Elle est décédée en 1589, à Wilmslow, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Rachel Eccles 1510 in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Henry Eccles 20 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Spurr 20. Sie hatte mit Sir Theodore Wilkinson mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1714 hat sie in Hough, Argyll, Scotland und 1714 in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England gelebt. Sie starb 1589 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Rachel Eccles è nata il nel 1510 nel Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, sua padre, John Henry Eccles, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Spurr, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Sir Theodore Wilkinson. Vissuto a Hough, Argyll, Scotland nel 1714 e nel Great Budworth, Cheshire, England nel 1714. Morì nel 1589, nel Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Rachel Ecclesが1510年にイギリスチェシュアイアウィルムスロウで生まれた時，父John Henry Ecclesは20歳，母Elizabeth Spurrは20歳であった。彼女はSir Theodore Wilkinsonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1714年にはスコットランドアルグイルホーウに，1714年にはイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスに住んでいた。彼女は1589年にイギリスチェシュアイアウィルムスロウで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Rachel Eccles(이)가 1510년 영국 체실르 윌슬로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Henry Eccles(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Spurr(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir Theodore Wilkinson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1714년도에 스컷랜드 아그이 허프에서, 1714년도에 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 살았다. 그녀는 1589년 영국 체실르 윌슬로에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Rachel Eccles nasceu em 1510, em Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Henry Eccles, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Spurr, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Sir Theodore Wilkinson. Ela viveu em Hough, Argyll, Scotland em 1714 e em Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1714. Ela faleceu em 1589, em Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Rachel Eccles родилась в 1510 г. в местности уилмслоу, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Henry Eccles было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Spurr, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Sir Theodore Wilkinson. Она жила в местности хоую, аргилл, Шотландия в 1714 году и в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия в 1714 году. Она умерла в 1589 г. в местности уилмслоу, чешир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Rachel Eccles nació en 1510, en Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Henry Eccles, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Spurr, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Sir Theodore Wilkinson. Vivió en Hough, Argyll, Scotland en 1714 y en Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1714. Murió en 1589, en Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
